task.title: MongoDB Document Store Setup
task.description: Deploy Percona MongoDB operator for flexible integration configs and templates

implementation.details:
1. Install Percona MongoDB operator
2. Create MongoDB replica set with 1 instance
3. Configure authentication and authorization
4. Create collections for integrations and templates
5. Set up backup policies

task.acceptance_criteria: MongoDB is running, accepts connections, can create/query documents in integrations collection
